title: On Hold Projects
excerpt: Is there a way to signify a project is on hold and that its data should not be pulled into dashboard reports until it is taken off hold status?

posts.author: Somnio (Somnio)
posts.cookedHtml: Is there a way to signify a project is on hold and that its data should not be pulled into dashboard reports until it is taken off hold status?

posts.author: BiancaT (Bianca Taylor)
posts.cookedHtml: Hi @Somnio! You could utilise a status column to indicate that the project is currently on-hold if it’s on an item level, however from what I can understand you’re referring to an entire board - is this correct?
